title: PROMESA enacted
claim: U.S. Congress enacted PROMESA (Puerto Rico Oversight, Management, and Economic Stability Act), Pub. L. 114-187, establishing a federal oversight board and Title III debt-restructuring process.

title: FOMB members appointed
related_entity_name: Financial Oversight and Management Board for Puerto Rico
claim: The seven members of the Financial Oversight and Management Board for Puerto Rico were appointed under PROMESA.

title: Commonwealth Title III petition filed
claim: The Oversight Board filed a Title III petition for the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico in the U.S. District Court for the District of Puerto Rico.

title: COFINA Title III petition filed
related_entity_name: Puerto Rico Sales Tax Financing Corporation
claim: The Oversight Board filed a Title III petition for COFINA (Puerto Rico Sales Tax Financing Corporation).

title: PREPA Title III petition filed
claim: The Oversight Board filed a Title III petition for the Puerto Rico Electric Power Authority (PREPA).

title: Hurricane Maria landfall
claim: Hurricane Maria made landfall in Puerto Rico, deepening the fiscal, infrastructure, and debt-restructuring crisis.

title: COFINA Plan of Adjustment confirmed
related_entity_name: Puerto Rico Sales Tax Financing Corporation
claim: The Title III court confirmed COFINA's Plan of Adjustment, restructuring roughly $17.6 billion of sales-tax-backed debt.

title: PREPA Restructuring Support Agreement advanced
claim: PREPA and certain bondholders advanced a Restructuring Support Agreement for PREPA's outstanding revenue bonds.

title: LUMA Energy assumes PREPA transmission and distribution
claim: LUMA Energy assumed operation of PREPA's transmission and distribution system under a public-private partnership agreement.

title: Commonwealth Plan of Adjustment effective
claim: The Commonwealth's Plan of Adjustment became effective, restructuring roughly $33 billion of liabilities and cutting about $22 billion of debt.

title: HTA Plan of Adjustment confirmed
related_entity_name: Puerto Rico Highways and Transportation Authority
claim: The Title III court confirmed the Plan of Adjustment for the Puerto Rico Highways and Transportation Authority (HTA).

title: Genera PR assumes PREPA generation
claim: Genera PR assumed operation of PREPA's legacy power-generation fleet under a public-private partnership agreement.
